inputs.prompt: Newsletter: The Craft. Topic: Business of freelance writing. Audience: Freelance writers and journalists. About 40% open every edition, 30% open occasionally, 30% rarely open. Subscriber count: 4,200. Some are full-time freelancers, some are staff writers considering going freelance, some are editors who want to understand the freelance market. Model: Free with a paid tier planned.
Newsletter: Daily Science Brief. Topic: Daily science news. Audience: General science enthusiasts. Subscribers: 12,000. Open rate: 38%. No other data available.

Newsletter: European Housing Watch. Topic: EU housing policy. Audience: Mix of EU policy professionals (Brussels-based), national-level housing researchers, journalists covering urban affairs, and housing advocates/NGO staff. Subscribers: 7,800. Open rate: 48%. Survey data shows 35% are policy professionals, 25% researchers, 20% journalists, 20% advocates/other. Model: Free, considering paid tier with quarterly data reports.
